name.description: The resource name of the channel. Must be unique within the location on the project.

third_party_provider.description: The name of the event provider (e.g. Eventarc SaaS partner) associated with the channel. This provider will be granted permissions to publish events to the channel. Format: `projects/{project}/locations/{location}/providers/{provider_id}`.

crypto_key_name.description: Resource name of a KMS crypto key (managed by the user) used to encrypt/decrypt their event data. It must match the pattern `projects/*/locations/*/keyRings/*/cryptoKeys/*`.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
